# IndieSpeedRun — llms.txt

## Site
- Name: IndieSpeedRun
- URL: https://www.indiespeedrun.com
- Description: Indie game coverage and speedrun world records. Rooted in the Indie Speed Run jam (2012–2015). Scene-aware, no fabricated claims.

## What this site is
Static niche site covering:
1. Speedrun world records (Minecraft, SM64, Silksong, others) — sourced weekly from speedrun.com
2. Indie game recommendations — original curation with a speedrun-friendliness scoring column
3. Speedrun tools — browser-based timer with splits and PB tracking, no backend
4. Heritage archive — the Indie Speed Run jam (2012–2015), 48-hour game jam with press coverage from NBC, PC Gamer, Game Developer, Unity, ModDB

## Editorial model
No fake named experts. No fabricated "we tested" claims. Sources linked. Updated-date stamps are real. See /methodology/ for explicit selection criteria.

## Key pages
- / : homepage, hub links
- /speedruns/ : speedrun world records cluster
- /indie-games/ : best indie games cluster
- /speedrun-timer/ : free browser timer
- /jam-archive/ : heritage archive
- /about/ : editorial model
- /methodology/ : curation criteria

## Permitted use
Content may be indexed and cited. If citing world-record data, note the original source is speedrun.com.
